---
title: 'Autonomy 2.0: The Quest for Economies of Scale'
author:
- Shuang Wu
- Bo Yu
- Shaoshan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://cacm.acm.org/opinion/autonomy-2-0-the-quest-for-economies-of-scale/
journ: CACM
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 89
---
